name: GradientPattern
description: Dynamic gradient background patterns using preset factories. Supports 1–n semantic color tokens with fill/truncate to preset arity, numeric intensity (1–100), neutral-aware rendering, and extensible custom presets. Uses OKLCH color-mix for automatic dark mode and brand adaptation.
whenToUse: Add decorative gradient backgrounds to hero sections, cards, page backgrounds, or any container that needs visual richness. Use preset factories with parameters for positioned glows, directional auroras, etc. Adapts automatically to brand color, dark mode, and motion settings.
avoidWhen: Content needs maximum readability. Use solid backgrounds for text-heavy sections.
accessibilityRequirements: Always decorative (aria-hidden). Content children remain accessible via inner content wrapper.

preset.description: Gradient preset – built-in name or a PresetDefinition object from a factory function (e.g. glow({ positions, spread })).

colors.description: Semantic color tokens (1–n). Fill/truncated to preset arity. When all tokens are 'neutral', algorithms shift lightness/chroma instead of hue.

animated.description: Enable ambient animation loop. Uses WAAPI, respects prefers-reduced-motion.

overlay.description: Render as absolute-positioned layer behind content.

speed.description: Animation speed multiplier (>1 = faster). Only applies when animated is true.

progress.description: External progress value (0–1) for scroll-driven gradient shift. Driven by the app layer (e.g. scrollProgressAction + mapRange). The gradient shifts within its container via translateY, creating a parallax effect.

route.label: GradientPattern
route.description: Dynamic gradient backgrounds using theme tokens

examples.title: Presets
examples.code:
{#each [ { p: "mesh", c: ["primary", "secondary", "accent"] }, { p: "aurora", c: ["primary", "info", "accent"] }, { p: "glow", c: ["primary", "danger"] }, { p: "sweep", c: ["primary", "secondary", "accent"] }, { p: "noise", c: ["primary", "info", "warning"] }, ] as item}
{item.p}
{/each}

examples.title: Multi-Color
examples.code:
{#each [ { label: "1 color", c: ["primary"] }, { label: "2 colors", c: ["primary", "danger"] }, { label: "3 colors", c: ["primary", "danger", "info"] }, ] as item}
{item.label}
{/each}

examples.title: Intensity (1–100)
examples.code:
{#each [15, 50, 90] as val}
{val}
{/each}

examples.title: Neutral-Aware
examples.code:
chromatic
neutral

examples.title: Preset Factories with Parameters
examples.code:
glow – custom positions + spread
aurora – direction: 200deg
sweep – centered, 90deg

examples.title: Animated
examples.code:
speed: 1 (default)
speed: 2

examples.title: Container with Content
examples.code:
<sg-gradient-pattern preset="aurora" colors={["primary", "info", "accent"]} intensity={70} class="sg-demo-gradientpattern-1">
    <sg-stack gap="related">
        <sg-heading level={2} size="2xl" color="primary">Hero Section</sg-heading>
        <sg-text color="secondary">Content renders above the gradient via the inner wrapper.</sg-text>
    </sg-stack>
</sg-gradient-pattern>

examples.title: Overlay Mode
examples.code: Overlay behind content The gradient sits behind this text with pointer-events: none.
